results.rendered_html:
bhidura (wie eben)
1〉 adj.  P. 3,2,162 .  VOP. 26,152 .
a〉 zerspaltend, zersprengend, vernichtend: mohāndhakāra˚  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 170,b,13 .
— b〉 sich spaltend, spaltbar: kāṣṭha  P. , Sch.
— c〉 in nahe Berührung tretend, sich vermengend, sich vermischend: nīlāśmadyutibhidurāmbhasaḥ  ŚIŚ. 4,26 .
— 2〉 n. Donnerkeil  AK. 1,1,1,42 .  H. 180 .  HALĀY. 1,56 .

results.rendered_html:
bhidura a. [bhid-kurac]
1 Breaking, bursting, splitting.
2 Fragile, brittle.
3 Blended, variegated, mixed, mingled; naliśmadyutibhidurāṃbhaso'paratra  Śi. 4. 26 ; 19. 58 , 20. 1. 
— raḥ The Plakṣa tree.
— raṃ A thunderbolt.
